evals.name: mudchart-v9-migration
evals.prompt: I'm upgrading my Blazor Server app from MudBlazor 8 to MudBlazor 9. The file at fixtures/eval-1-chart/Dashboard.razor uses MudChart with the v8 API (InputData / XAxisLabels / MudTimeSeriesChart). Please update it to use the v9 chart API so it builds against MudBlazor 9.3.0.

assertions.text: Dashboard.razor no longer uses the v8 'InputData' parameter on MudChart
Dashboard.razor no longer uses the v8 'XAxisLabels' parameter (uses ChartLabels instead)
Dashboard.razor no longer uses the v8 'InputLabels' parameter (uses ChartLabels instead)
Dashboard.razor no longer uses the removed <MudTimeSeriesChart> component
Dashboard.razor uses the typed ChartSeries<T> generic for chart data
Dashboard.razor uses BarChartOptions (or similar type-specific options class)
Dashboard.razor wraps chart data with .AsChartDataSet() (the v9 helper)
Dashboard.razor preserves the @page "/dashboard" route

evals.name: dialog-async-and-menu-context
evals.prompt: I bumped MudBlazor from 8.11.0 to 9.3.0 in my Blazor Server project. Now my Pages/UserList.razor file at fixtures/eval-2-dialog-and-async/UserList.razor doesn't build. Errors are about IDialogService.Show, ShowMessageBox, IDataGrid.ServerData signature, and the MudMenu activator. Please fix it for MudBlazor 9.

assertions.text: UserList.razor no longer calls DialogService.Show<...>(...) (synchronous v8 method)
UserList.razor uses await DialogService.ShowAsync<...>(...)
UserList.razor uses ShowMessageBoxAsync
LoadServerDataAsync accepts CancellationToken as second parameter
MudMenu's ActivatorContent button wires OnClick to @context.ToggleAsync
UserList.razor preserves the @page "/users" route
UserList.razor preserves all four grid columns

evals.name: custom-form-component-converter
evals.prompt: After upgrading to MudBlazor 9, my custom MudFormComponent fails to compile with errors about GetDefaultConverter, WriteValueAsync, and a missing constructor overload. The file is at fixtures/eval-3-custom-form-component/TagsInput.razor.cs. Please fix it for MudBlazor 9 while preserving its behavior.

assertions.text: TagsInput.razor.cs overrides GetDefaultConverter() (the abstract method new in v9)
TagsInput.razor.cs no longer overrides WriteValueAsync
TagsInput.razor.cs overrides SetValueCoreAsync
TagsInput.razor.cs constructor no longer passes a Converter to base()
Validate() override is renamed to ValidateAsync()
Preserves comma-split + trim tag parsing behavior
